name: Narrow Pass
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>狭</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せま</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>き<ruby lang="jp"><rb>通</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>つう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>路</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ろ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: This card can only be activated when both players have 2 monsters or less on their respective sides of the field. Both players can only Normal Summon up to 2 additional monsters on their sides of the field.
eff: This card can only be activated when both players have 2 monsters or less on their respective sides of the field. Both players can only Normal Summon up to 2 additional monsters on their sides of the field.
